chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-1136 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 24.11.2025 Mr.Ashfaque Ahmed Mallah, Advocate for applicant Mr.Ahsan Gul Dahri, Advocate for complainant Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G ****** For the reasons to be recorded, interim pre-arrest bail is declined. Consequently, interim bail Order passed on 18.9.2025, is hereby recalled and applicant/accused is taken into custody and remanded to Central Prison Hyderabad, with direction to produce him before the trial Court on the next date of hearing. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
